name: agent-workflow
description: A lightweight multi-agent engineering workflow template and skill package for specs, risk levels, task cards, handoffs, verification, and delivery reports.

interface.shortDescription: Install and run a lightweight multi-agent engineering workflow
interface.longDescription: Use Agent Workflow to install a reusable project workflow and guide coding agents through intake, risk classification, specs, task cards, TDD, handoffs, verification, and delivery reports.
defaultPrompt: Install Agent Workflow in this project.
Start a new task using the Agent Workflow process.
